title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-14
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, updating health metrics and stats for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the repository.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest health and usage data.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot walking through a digital greenhouse, checking on glowing code-plants with a clipboard to represent automated health checks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot walking through a digital greenhouse filled with glowing code-plants. The robot holds a tiny clipboard checking metrics. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
